memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< InStructType > const &InArray, FString &OutJsonString, int64 CheckFlags=0, int64 SkipFlags=0, int32 Indent=0)
memberdef.name: TArrayUStructToJsonString

briefdescription.para: Convert an UEnum value into a String enum value.
Convert a String enum value into a UEnum value.

simplesect.para: UEnum value of specified String enum.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve Platform name from the specified PlatformType.

memberdef.argsstring: (TSharedPtr< FJsonObject > const &JsonObjectPtr, uint8 const Flags=FieldRemovalFlagObjects|FieldRemovalFlagStrings|FieldRemovalFlagArrays|FieldRemovalFlagNested, TArray< FString > const &ExcludedFieldNames={})
memberdef.name: RemoveEmptyFieldsFromJson

briefdescription.para: Remove fields which have empty values according to the given flags. Defaults to removing empty objects/arrays, blank strings, and looping recursively on object and array field values. Possible Removal flags are as follow:

listitem.para: FieldRemovalFlagObjects: for empty JSON object value
FieldRemovalFlagArrays: for empty JSON array value

parameterdescription.para: JSON object which will be modified.
Removal flags for the empty value using bit flag.
Specified field names that will be excluded in the omission process.

briefdescription.para: Convert array of UStructs into JSON array string.
Generate a new team Id for player session.

simplesect.para: String of team id with UUID format.

briefdescription.para: Encode HMAC the message using built in function from UnrealEngine and then Base64 the result.
Get current Platform name.
Execute XOR operation between two string values.
Retrieve AuthTrustId that was cached in a filed.
Store AuthTrustId value to a file.
Retrieve Authorization Code provided by AccelByte Launcher.

simplesect.para: Authorization code either from command line argument or environment variable.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve an information if get authorization code is using exchange method provided by AccelByte Launcher.

simplesect.para: Whether the current exchange method using exchange code or authorization code from command line argument.

briefdescription.para: Get game client flight id.
Get the key to DeviceID cache entry.
Parse command line to obtain an argument that:

listitem.para: contain a value that following equal sign (=) Assuming the switch is case insesitive Example: -serverip=127.0.0.1 key or switch is the serverip value is 127.0.0.1

parameterdescription.para: The operation result will be returned through this parameter.

simplesect.para: True if value from the second parameter is returned and
False if no value/args can be found

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Section, const FString &Key, FString &Value, const FString &DefaultSection=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: LoadABConfigFallback

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Section, const FString &Key, bool &Value, const FString &DefaultSection=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: LoadABConfigFallback

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Section, const FString &Key, int &Value, const FString &DefaultSection=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: LoadABConfigFallback

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< FString > &InArray, const int32 Num, TArray< TArray< FString > > &OutArrays)
memberdef.name: SplitArraysToNum

detaileddescription.para:
Split an array into multiple arrays with a maximum element number.
InArray
Array to split.
Num
Number of maximum elements per array.
OutArrays
Result with array split with maximum element number.

briefdescription.para: Convert an AccelByte general sort enum into a string value.

parameterdescription.para: The AccelByte enum value to be converted.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the given enum value.

briefdescription.para: Obtain DeviceID for development mode GAME CLIENT NON SHIPPING BUILD ONLY! Can be controlled using either command-line args or configuration file.

detaileddescription.para: IF you want to FORCEFULLY override the device ID: Please use Command-line args. Example: "PackagedGameClient.exe -deviceid YOUR_DEVICE_ID ......"

ELSE use the "DefaultEngine.ini" file to control the device ID. First of all, select the override method using this field in configuration: ===>Section: [AccelByte.Dev] Key: DeviceIdOverrideMethod=(STRING) Value: Supported string as enumerator = {COMMANDLINE, PICK_RANDOM, RANDOMIZE, PERSISTENT} Example [AccelByte.Dev] DeviceIdOverrideMethod=RANDOMIZE IF this field is wrong or left empty: The override behavior will be done by the following method order [COMMANDLINE, PICK_RANDOM, RANDOMIZE, PERSISTENT]

Then specify the key/value for the list of PICK_RANDOM override method ===>Section: [AccelByte.Dev] Key: [_] DeviceId=(STRING[]) Example [AccelByte.Dev] +DeviceId=aaasdfsadfasd +DeviceId=sdahssdghsgfd +DeviceId=safvcgdsfgsgf +DeviceId=gsdgdsfgfafsf

COMPILED EXAMPLE from DefaultEngine.ini [AccelByte.Dev] DeviceIdOverrideMethod=[COMMANDLINE, or PICK_RANDOM, or RANDOMIZE, or PERSISTENT] +DeviceId=aaasdfsadfasd +DeviceId=sdahssdghsgfd +DeviceId=safvcgdsfgsgf +DeviceId=gsdgdsfgfafsf
To deny all override and pretend to be shipping build: ===>Section: [AccelByte.Dev]

parameterdescription.para: The default value if there is no override found

briefdescription.para: Try to sanitize the URL by removing trailing slashes.
Create a randomized 30 digit alpha-numeric DeviceID.
Try to obtain DeviceID from a cached value if not found using the Default parameter and also store it into the cache.
Get the development mode DeviceID override method from "DefaultEngine.ini" Section: [AccelByte.Dev] Key: DeviceIdOverrideMethod=(STRING).
